final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9-grid cover image set for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) social media, featuring a casual user-generated content style showcasing the DJI Pocket 4 camera.

Style/medium: casual user-generated content aesthetic, authentic smartphone photography style, playful and approachable visual design
Composition: 9-square grid layout optimized for Xiaohongshu cover format, centered main title placement
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 handheld camera as hero product, lifestyle context suggesting first-time user experience
Scene/backdrop: everyday lifestyle setting, clean and uncluttered background suitable for social media feed
Color palette: warm and inviting tones with playful accent colors, Instagram-friendly aesthetic
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Constraints: font must be cute and differentiated from standard templates; maintain authentic "素人" (ordinary user) aesthetic; grid must be cohesive as a set
Avoid: overly polished commercial photography; generic stock image look; aggressive sales language; complex decorative elements that compete with product
